name: pelorus-nav
description: Pelorus Nav — open-source web-based marine chartplotter

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && rm -f dist/*.pmtiles dist/*.coverage.geojson dist/*.search.json
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.sprites: spreet tools/sprites/svg public/sprites/nautical && spreet --retina tools/sprites/svg public/sprites/nautical@2x && printf '\n' >> public/sprites/nautical.json && printf '\n' >> public/sprites/nautical@2x.json && bun tools/sprites/build-s52-sprites.ts
scripts.sprites:catalog: uv run --with reportlab --with svglib python tools/sprites/render-sprite-catalog.py
scripts.cap:sync: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && bunx cap run android
scripts.cap:build: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleRelease
scripts.cap:build:debug: CAPACITOR=1 bun run build && bunx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleDebug
